CodeChallenges.allowCustomInputDescription: Let students test their code with custom input
CodeChallenges.allowedLanguagesDescription: Select which programming languages students can use
CodeChallenges.configureDescription: Set up test cases, time limits, and allowed programming languages

form.allowedLanguagesHint: Select which programming languages students can use
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem, constraints, and examples...
form.enableHintsDescription: Allow students to request hints with a score penalty
form.starterCodeHint: Optional template code provided to students
form.testCasesDescription: Add test cases to validate solutions. Visible tests are shown to students.
form.testDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Edge case with empty input
form.timeLimitHint: Maximum execution time per test case (100-30000ms)
form.title: Challenge Title

CodeChallenges.gradingStrategyDescription: How to calculate the final score

gradingStrategyOptions.allOrNothingHint: Student must pass all test cases to receive points
gradingStrategyOptions.partialHint: Points awarded based on percentage of tests passed
gradingStrategyOptions.weightedHint: Each test case has its own point value

CodeChallenges.hiddenTestCasesDescription: Test cases only used during final submission
CodeChallenges.noCodeToSubmit: Please write some code to submit
CodeChallenges.noHiddenTestCases: No hidden test cases. Add some for validation.
CodeChallenges.noResultsYet: Run your code or submit to see results
CodeChallenges.noVisibleTestCases: No visible test cases. Submit your solution to run against hidden tests.
CodeChallenges.notConfiguredDescription: This code challenge hasn't been set up yet. Please contact your instructor.

CodeChallenges.testWeightDescription: Points allocated for this test case
CodeChallenges.timeLimitDescription: Maximum execution time per test case in seconds

validation.atLeastOneLanguage: At least one language must be selected
validation.atLeastOneTestCase: At least one test case is required
validation.maxSubmissionsRange: Max submissions must be between {min} and {max}
validation.memoryLimitRange: Memory limit must be between {min} and {max} KB
validation.timeLimitRange: Time limit must be between {min} and {max} ms

CodeChallenges.visibleTestCasesDescription: Test cases students can see and run against

ExamActivity.allowResultReviewDescription: Students can see their answers after submission
ExamActivity.answersRecovered: Your previous answers have been recovered
ExamActivity.antiCheatingDescription: Violations are being monitored. After {threshold} violations, your exam will be auto-submitted.

ExamActivity.confirmSubmissionHint: Please check the box above to enable submission
ExamActivity.confirmSubmissionMessage: Please review your exam before submitting. This action cannot be undone.

ExamActivity.instruction5: Copy and paste functions are disabled
ExamActivity.keyboardShortcutsHelp: Shortcuts: ← / → navigate questions, 1-9 select answers, Ctrl/Cmd+Enter open submit confirmation, ? show this message

ExamActivity.noAttemptsRemaining: You have no attempts remaining for this exam
ExamActivity.pleaseRefresh: Please refresh the page and try again

ExamActivity.rightClickDisabled: Right-click is disabled during the exam
ExamActivity.unansweredQuestionsWarning: You have {count} unanswered questions. Are you sure you want to submit?
ExamActivity.violationDialogDescription: A {type} violation was detected (occurrence {count}/{max}). This has been recorded and may lead to auto-submission.
ExamActivity.violationDialogGuidance: How to avoid: stay in fullscreen (if required), avoid switching tabs, and do not use developer tools or copy/paste during the exam. If you'd like to appeal, follow the link below.
